specific_mechanism: AS-INDEX-REG: finite-dim analytical-index estimate + topological-class regularizer + critical-point class tracking during fine-tune
llm_application: During fine-tuning, periodically compute a finite-dimensional invariant from the loss-gradient operator (difference between dimensions of two subspaces); estimate a corresponding topological-style invariant from Hessian eigenstructure; add a regularizer that penalizes updates which would change this invariant class; track the critical-point class as a training signal.
novelty_claim: SAM/Sophia/Hessian-trace target scalar curvature; topological-invariant-class regularizer is mechanically distinct.
